name: Fruit Soup#2
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Fresh, canned, or dried fruit
Vanilla or Almond extract to taste
recipeInstructions:
Apricot, pineapple, pear, white grape
1. Cook tapioca in water and fruit juice until it begins to thicken.
2. Add the remaining ingredients, except banana. If using dried fruit, simmer until soft. Other fruits will be cooked enough when they come to a boil.
3. Serve hot or chilled with banana sliced on top. Delicious served alone or over cornbread or whole-wheat toast.
